title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 13 June 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 13 June 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 13 June 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 14/06/2025
The ship recycling market enters the week on a subdued note, with most regions seeing limited activity and cautious sentiment. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-06-14_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-10-June-13-June-2025_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2025-06-14_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-10-June-13-June-2025_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
10 June - 13 June 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The ship recycling market enters the week on a subdued note, with most regions seeing limited activity and cautious sentiment. India remains quiet as
buyers hold off, waiting for prices to align with their expectations, while Bangladesh stays inactive due to the Eid holidays and growing focus on the
upcoming enforcement of the Hong Kong Convention.
